category_sources: Official Todo.txt site describes Todo.txt CLI for interacting with todo.txt at the command line.
source_facts.description says todo-txt is a minimal todo.txt-focused editor.
display_name_sources: Official Todo.txt site calls the command-line tool Todo.txt CLI.
docs_sources: Official Todo.txt homepage links to documentation for using Todo.txt CLI.
Official repository includes USAGE.md and README.md as command documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/todotxt/todo.txt-cli, so repo is intentionally not re-determined.
tags_sources: Official repository describes a simple extensible shell script for managing a todo.txt file.
